raw_title: Correction to “Conceptualizing Digital Democracy: A Policy‐Oriented Approach through Computational Text Analysis”
title_en: Correction to “Conceptualizing Digital Democracy: A Policy‐Oriented Approach through Computational Text Analysis”
title_zh: 对《概念化数字民主：通过计算文本分析的政策导向方法》的更正
plain_summary_zh: 这是一篇对先前发表的关于数字民主研究的更正文章。原研究使用计算文本分析方法，从政策角度探讨数字民主的概念。
plain_summary_en: This is a correction to a previously published study on digital democracy. The original research used computational text analysis to explore the concept of digital democracy from a policy perspective.
research_direction_zh: 数字治理与民主理论的研究，关注技术如何影响政治参与和政策制定过程。
research_direction_en: Research on digital governance and democratic theory, focusing on how technology affects political participation and policy-making processes.
